subcodes.first_line: O true believer in the verses of God! It is said that the greatest power in the world is the power of an all-compelling sovereignty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله گویند که قوای اعظم عالم قوه سلطنت قاهره و سطوت حکومت باهره
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
